# Alec Mingione - Founder & Engineer
Alec Mingione is an engineer, creator, and the founder of MiPi and AMWare, based in Phoenix, Arizona. This website serves as his personal brand, portfolio, and digital identity.

## About Alec Mingione
Alec has been programming since he was 8 years old. His work is fueled by a passion for technology, creating the future, and empowering creators to build wealth and communities while prioritizing privacy and encryption. Through AMWare, he provides enterprise-level software, AI solutions, web applications, and design services.

## Key Projects & Portfolio
- **MiPi**: A creator platform and SaaS empowering artists to build communities and maintain privacy/control over their work.
- **Kingdom Kode**: Agency providing top-tier AI, software, web, and design solutions.
- **ConvensionSuite - GSC™**: Enterprise event management system for general service contracts (Next.js & Oracle NetSuite).
- **PortalGen™**: Customizable system for generating PWAs using Oracle NetSuite backends.
- **Celestial Studio Salon**: Full-stack SaaS booking system with Stripe integration for a local salon.
- **@neatsuite/http**: Open-source TypeScript NetSuite HTTP client.
- **Auth.js NetSuite Provider**: Official NetSuite provider for Auth.js.
- **Chamoji**: CLI alternative to gitmoji-changelog.
- **VB Remote Sat**: Desktop support automation tool utilized globally.

## Tech Stack & Expertise
Alec builds applications utilizing modern, highly performant tools. The core tech stack includes:
- **Next.js / React** (Full-Stack Applications)
- **Supabase** (Postgres, Auth, Storage)
- **Tailwind CSS & Shadcn UI** (Styling & Design Systems)
